review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'tasks/v0.7-m2-unified-model.md'.

Verify the markdown file explicitly answers the 6 defining questions from the M2 directive (Artifact taxonomy, Task lifecycle, Reviewer vs. Gatekeeper, Acceptance vs. Evaluation, Personal vs. Team mode core, and Low cognitive load principles).
Verify NO implementation of .agent-state/ physical migrations occurred.
Verify NO modifications to src/ or MCP server capabilities occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
